• Architected and built the foundational tech stack of an AI email marketing automation platform for D2C e-commerce brands, using React and AWS that went from no users to now over 30 mid-sized brands. 
• Led the development of our revamped end-to-end email generation service, automating email creation with a mix of user input and external integrations (Shopify, Klaviyo), utilizing AI(GPT4) for content generation, fine-tuned based on brand-specific data. 
• Led constant problem-solving discussions where solutions had to be implemented and released to production quickly.

•Helped lead a migration of the entire Intuit API Gateway Service from EC2 to Kubernetes, increasing performance and decreasing cost by 40%. 
• Created a POC to move TLS termination and other functionality to Lambda@Edge that dramatically increased performance and decreased load on Java application.
